description: Sharpen lines and text contrast, preserve every part/screw/label exactly
prompt_template:
You are enhancing a single page-crop from a 3D printer assembly manual.
Output an enhanced version of the SAME image, only sharper and clearer.

HARD CONSTRAINTS — content must be preserved exactly:
  - Do NOT add, remove, duplicate, or relocate any part, screw, washer, arrow,
    callout number, dimension label, or text.
  - Count of every type of screw, plate, hole and component must remain identical.
  - The step number circle (e.g. "(1)") and instructions text must remain intact
    and at the same position.
  - The X-LOCK logo must remain in its original position.
  - Keep the dark navy / purple background and light line-art color scheme.
  - Aspect ratio identical to the input.

ENHANCEMENTS allowed:
  - Increase contrast between line art and background.
  - Sharpen edges so technical lines and small text are crisp.
  - Reduce raster blur on label text (e.g. "M3x22mm SCREWS", "FC ISOLATOR").
  - Slightly increase resolution if helpful.

Output ONLY the enhanced image, no commentary.
